title: Spray Mop Refill Pads for Flash Powermop, 4PCS Microfibre Mop Pads Washable for Household Wet Dry Floor Mop, Reusable Mop Head Replacement for Hardwood Laminate Floor Cleaning
features: Compatible with Flash Powermop - The size of our microfiber mop pad is 11.8*5.5 inches, which is perfectly fit for Flash floor mop, besides our mop pad replacement also compatible with 10/11/12 inch floor mops and spray mops. These mop heads replacement are very easy to use, simply sticks them to the velcro on the microfibre mop bottom and then you could start cleaning

Premium Spray Mop Heads Replacement - To Achieve a better performance of cleaning effect, we applied top grade high quality microfiber material in microfibre mop pads, unlike normal microfiber material, we make it enhanced the friction between mop refill head and floor in order to reach more efficiency cleaning without damage the floor. Easily removing any hard cleaning stains, oil, hair and footprints

Multipurpose Mop Refill Pads - Our washable mop pads can be used to dry mop and wet mop. For dry mop, these reusable mop pads can be used to attach dirt, hair and crumbs, while for wet mop, these floor mop refills can make your floor sparkle and absorb extra water. Plus these microfiber mop heads replacements adapt to all kinds of detergent without being damage

Durable Mop Pads for Cleaning Floor - These thicken mop pad replacement are buit for long-lasting use. Our spray mop pad can be used in all laminate, hardwood, tile, stone, ceramic, tile floors. With excellent cleaning effect, these microfiber floor mop pad is an essential addition to home, kitchen, office, apartment, restaurant

Environment-friendly Mop Pads Reusable - Compared with disposable wet floor wipes that need to be replaced frequently, our mop refill wipes are great alternative to disposable floor wipes. These spray mop replacement pads can be put into the washer and dryer, and then reuse for hundreds of times. Not only saving your money, but also contributing to the environment
description: Product Description Product Specification Package Included: Microfibre Mop Pads Refills ( Mop does NOT included! ) Aplication: Compatible with Flash Powermop and Other Brand 10" to 12" Mops for Cleaning Floors Material: High Density Microfiber Size: 11.8*5.5 inches Color: Purple Floor Mop Pads Why do you want to choose TINA&TONY microfiber mop pad replacement? 1. Reusable Mop Pads - After being used as wet mopping or dry mopping, the mop refill pads can be washed in wahing machine or by hand to help you save more time and effort on house cleaning. 2. Excellent Cleaning Ability - The thicken wet pads can easily clean the narrow corners and fully gather pet fur, hair, debris, dust, oil or other stubborn stain, and these mop pads refills also can clean windows and mirrors. 3. Picks Up Pet Hair - If you are disturbing by pet hair shedding, our microfibre mop pads are good choice for you. Its cloth construction is designed for catching pet hair. This microfiber mop head can gather hair easily. 4. Save Money&Resource - Unlike disposable floor mop pads, Our microfiber mop refill wipes can be reused for hundred times. Not only saving your money but also good for the environment. The Characteristics of Our Mop Pads Refills ✔Easy to Use - When you use a clean mop pad replacement, just stick it to the wet jet mop head without worrying about falling off.and put the dirty mop head replacement into the washing machine. Only need few seconds. ✔Good on many kinds of Floor - The spray mop heads replacement can be easily used on most floors, such as wood, laminate, tile, vinyl, marble, glass, etc. Also these spray mop replacement pads apply to many kinds of detergent. ✔Multipurpose Mop Pads - Our washable mop pads can be used to dry mop and wet mop. For dry mop, these wet floor wipes can be used to attach dirt, hair and crumbs, while for wet mop, these floor mop refills can absorb extra water. ✔Premium Material - The soft microfiber reusable pads surface glides easily on your floors and saves it from scratches. Deep cleaning cloth without scrubbing strips, works gently and effectively delivering best results. ✔Strong Water Absorption - Our wet jet refill has super water absorbent, so the mop refill head can absorb and lock water quickly and make the floor dry fast without leaving streaks.
